'''lopasaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:pickaninny|pickaninny]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-p-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pickaninny|pickaninny]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| lopasaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || lopasithi || lopasiji || lopasishi || lopasiki
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || lopasuthu || lopasuju || lopasushu || lopasuku
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || lopasuthu || lopasuju || lopasushu || lopasuku
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || lopasufthuf || lopasufjuf || lopasufshuf || lopasufkuf
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || lopasethe || lopaseje || lopaseshe || lopaseke
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || lopasotho || lopasojo || lopasosho || lopasoko
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || lopasotho || lopasojo || lopasosho || lopasoko
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || lopasofthof || lopasofjof || lopasofshof || lopasofkof
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || lopasïfthïf || lopasïfjïf || lopasïfshïf || lopasïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || lopasïfthïf || lopasïfjïf || lopasïfshïf || lopasïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || lopasïfthïf || lopasïfjïf || lopasïfshïf || lopasïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || lopasïfthïf || lopasïfjïf || lopasïfshïf || lopasïfkïf
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || lopasæthæ || lopasæjæ || lopasæshæ || lopasækæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || lopasatha || lopasaja || lopasasha || lopasaka
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || lopasatha || lopasaja || lopasasha || lopasaka
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || lopasafthaf || lopasafjaf || lopasafshaf || lopasafkaf
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || lopasasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || lopasshëasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || lopasroasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || lopasmuasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || lopasyaasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || golopasnkshëasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || golopasnkroasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || golopasnkmuasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || golopasnkyaasha
|-
| [[comparative]].none || lopapasasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || lopapasshëasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || lopapasroasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || lopapasmuasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || lopapasyaasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || golopapasnkshëasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || golopapasnkroasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || golopapasnkmuasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || golopapasnkyaasha
|-
| [[superlative]].none || lepæsasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || lepæsshëasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || lepæsroasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || lepæsmuasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || lepæsyaasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || golepæsnkshëasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || golepæsnkroasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || golepæsnkmuasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || golepæsnkyaasha
|-
| [[negative]].none || lopfasasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || lopfasshëasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || lopfasroasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || lopfasmuasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || lopfasyaasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || golopfasnkshëasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || golopfasnkroasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || golopfasnkmuasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || golopfasnkyaasha
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
